purpose: Records the five required setup cohorts and the explicit reason target end-to-end timings are not claimed by the current repository.
target_gap_summary: No get.frankennode.dev installer alias is shipped in this repository.
franken-node init does not auto-detect archetypes during onboarding.
FMP-001 through FMP-004 pathway telemetry is reserved target semantics, not live CLI output.
The full install-to-first-safe-production pathway is not yet measurable as a passing target E2E.

setup_results.current_boundary_evidence: docs/specs/section_13/bd-34d5_contract.md documents this as a future target, not current shipped behavior.
docs/policy/friction_minimized_pathway.md documents the current raw install/init/run surface.
No Windows install-to-production target harness is shipped.
No Docker install-to-production target harness is shipped.
The section-13 gate validates the documentation boundary rather than a live target pathway.
